description: Originally launched on Solana in Q4 2023, Pyth Network (PYTH) is the governance token of the decentralized oracle network Pyth. Now, as a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 PYTH gives original PYTH holders, users, and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: Pyth Network
